problem_statement: The selected read-only worker path has lease preflight and runtime dispatch admission witnesses, but it lacks a schema-backed active runtime lease admission witness that binds temporal lease evidence, distributed lease receipts, UAO, Phi_gov, and failure evidence before any future dispatch admission.
success_criteria: ReadOnlyWorkerRuntimeActiveLeaseAdmissionWitness validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example
the witness binds the read-only worker binding and lease preflight evidence
the witness requires active temporal lease evidence before any future dispatch admission
the witness requires distributed lease claim and distributed lease execution receipts before any future dispatch admission
active runtime lease admission remains unperformed
distributed lease claim and execution remain unperformed
runtime dispatch admission remains denied until active runtime lease admission evidence exists
runtime dispatch, worker invocation, runtime receipt emission, receipt append, filesystem writes, connector calls, success claims, and terminal closure remain denied
focused tests reject authority drift, contract drift, missing runtime refs, lease evaluation drift, decision drift, summary drift, malformed payloads, and SDLC artifact drift
non_goals: no launch, production, customer, or support readiness claim
constraints: active runtime lease admission witness is witness-only

future active lease admission must require operator approval, active temporal lease evidence, distributed lease claim receipt, distributed lease execution receipt, UAO, Phi_gov, WorkerFailureReceipt, and effect reconciliation
WorkerFailureReceipt remains mandatory for failed or partial lease admission evidence
Mfidel atomicity remains preserved and no text-processing decomposition is introduced
evidence_required: active runtime lease admission witness validator receipt
focused pytest receipt for active runtime lease admission witness behavior
